title: Ronaldo's Al Nassr have 'second chance' says boss
summary: Cristiano Ronaldo and Al Nassr, under coach Jorge Jesus, are relieved to have another opportunity to win the Saudi Pro League after a 1-1 draw with Al Hilal put their title celebration on hold. The draw means the title race remains competitive, keeping their championship hopes alive.
content: Cristiano Ronaldo and Al Nassr coach Jorge Jesus are relieved their side have "a second chance" to win the Saudi Pro League after their title celebrations were put on hold following a 1-1 draw with Al Hilal on Tuesday.

zh.title: 罗纳尔多的Al Nassr有"第二次机会"，主教练说
zh.summary: 克里斯蒂亚诺·罗纳尔多和在教练豪尔赫·耶稣麾下的Al Nassr对有机会赢得沙特职业足球联赛感到欣慰，尽管与Al Hilal的1-1平手延迟了他们的冠军庆祝。这个平手意味着冠军争夺仍然激烈，保持了他们的冠军梦想。

title: Sources: United plan formal Carrick manager talks
summary: Manchester United are planning formal discussions with Michael Carrick about becoming the permanent head coach for next season. The move signals the club's intent to continue with Carrick in a permanent capacity after his interim tenure.
content: Manchester United are planning talks with Michael Carrick about continuing as head coach next season, sources have told ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：曼联计划正式与卡里克进行主帅谈判
zh.summary: 曼彻斯特联队正在计划与迈克尔·卡里克进行正式讨论，讨论他在下赛季成为常任主教练的事宜。此举表明俱乐部有意在卡里克临时任期后继续与他合作。

title: Refs' chief Webb on Arsenal VAR call: 'Clear foul'...
summary: Referees' chief Howard Webb has confirmed that West Ham's disallowed goal against Arsenal was the correct decision due to a clear foul on goalkeeper David Raya. Webb called for further discussions on how grappling in the penalty area should be handled going forward.
content: Referees' chief Howard Webb has confirmed that the decision to rule out West Ham's equaliser against Arsenal was correct due to "a clear and obvious offence" on David Raya, and called for discussions to take place on grappling in the penalty area.

zh.title: 裁判长韦布论阿森纳VAR判罚："明显犯规"
zh.summary: 裁判长霍华德·韦布确认，韦斯特汉姆对阿森纳的被判无效进球是正确决定，因为对门将大卫·拉亚造成了明显犯规。韦布呼吁进一步讨论如何在今后处理禁区内的身体对抗。

title: Arbeloa backs Madrid president as election called
summary: Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa has expressed his support for president Florentino Pérez following the announcement of upcoming club elections. The coach's public endorsement comes at a significant moment for the club's leadership.
content: Real Madrid coach Álvaro Arbeloa has backed Florentino Pérez to lead the club forward, after the president called elections.

zh.title: 阿贝罗亚支持马德里主席选举启动
zh.summary: 皇马主教练阿尔瓦罗·阿贝罗亚在俱乐部即将举行选举的宣布后，表示了对主席弗洛伦蒂诺·佩雷斯的支持。这位教练的公开背书在俱乐部领导层变动的关键时刻出现。

title: Price of World Cup bus reduced after fan outcry
summary: Shuttle bus prices for travel to a World Cup stadium in New Jersey have been significantly reduced following widespread fan complaints about the initial fares. The price cuts represent a swift response from organizers to public backlash.
content: The prices of shuttle buses to one the World Cup stadium in New Jersey have been slashed following backlash from fans.

zh.title: 世界杯班车价格在球迷抗议后下调
zh.summary: 新泽西州世界杯体育场班车往返价格在广泛的球迷对初始票价的投诉后大幅下降。这次降价代表了组织者对公众反对意见的迅速回应。

title: Ancelotti: 'Improving' Neymar could play at WC
summary: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti reported that Neymar has made significant improvements in recent weeks and could potentially be included in the country's World Cup squad. Ancelotti has not yet confirmed whether Neymar will make the final roster.
content: Brazil coach Carlo Ancelotti has said Neymar has "improved a lot" in recent weeks but is yet to reveal if he will make the country's World Cup squad.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂："进步中的"内马尔可能参加世界杯
zh.summary: 巴西主教练卡洛·安切洛蒂报告称内马尔在最近几周取得了显著进步，可能被纳入国家世界杯阵容。安切洛蒂尚未确认内马尔是否将进入最终名单。

title: Reyna: Hard to answer if I should make U.S. team
summary: Giovanni Reyna scored a goal ending a year-long scoreless drought as he attempts to secure a spot on the United States World Cup roster. Reyna expressed uncertainty about whether he has done enough to earn selection for the tournament.
content: Giovanni Reyna said he was happy to score a goal which ended a yearlong scoreless run as he tries to make his case for a spot on the United States' roster for the FIFA World Cup.

zh.title: 雷纳：很难回答我是否应该入选美国队
zh.summary: 乔瓦尼·雷纳打进一球，结束了长达一年的进球荒，同时他也在争取入选美国世界杯名单。雷纳对自己是否做够了以获得比赛选拔表示不确定。

title: Flick: Waving Palestine flag is Yamal's 'decision'...
summary: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick defended star player Lamine Yamal's decision to wave a Palestinian flag during the team's LaLiga celebration parade. Flick stated that Yamal is old enough to make his own decisions regarding political expression.
content: Barcelona coach Hansi Flick said star player Lamine Yamal  was "old enough" to make his own decisions after he waved a Palestinian flag during an open-top bus parade as the team celebrated winning LaLiga.

zh.title: 弗利克：挥舞巴勒斯坦国旗是亚马尔的'决定'
zh.summary: 巴塞罗那教练汉西·弗利克为球星拉米内·亚马尔在球队西甲庆祝游行中挥舞巴勒斯坦国旗的决定进行了辩护。弗利克表示亚马尔已经足够大，可以就政治表达做出自己的决定。

title: 👕 Mexico unveil a WC rarity -- a third alternate ...
summary: Mexico have unveiled a third kit for the World Cup following a FIFA rule change that allows several teams to have three uniforms. The addition represents a rarity in World Cup history and reflects Mexico's stylish kit design.
content: Mexico have added a third kit to their impressively stylish World Cup wardrobe. Thanks to a FIFA rule change, a few other teams will have three kits.

zh.title: 👕 墨西哥推出世界杯罕见的第三套替代球衣
zh.summary: 在国际足联规则变更允许多支球队拥有三套球衣后，墨西哥为世界杯推出了第三套球衣。这项添加代表了世界杯历史上的罕见情况，反映了墨西哥时尚的球衣设计。

title: Man Utd chiefs to recommend Carrick for permanent job
summary: Manchester United's senior executives are expected to recommend Michael Carrick as the permanent manager to Sir Jim Ratcliffe. The recommendation reflects the club's confidence in Carrick's leadership abilities.
content: Michael Carrick is expected to be recommended to Sir Jim Ratcliffe as the permanent boss of Manchester United by the club's senior executives.

zh.title: 曼联高管推荐卡里克担任常任主帅
zh.summary: 曼联高管预计将向吉姆·拉特克利夫爵士推荐迈克尔·卡里克为常任主帅。这一推荐反映了俱乐部对卡里克领导能力的信心。

title: Might a former Celtic hero help Haiti surprise Scotland?
summary: Haiti is assembling a competitive World Cup squad with help from experienced scouts and persuasive agents, hoping to upset Scotland in their opening group match. The team's ambitious preparation demonstrates their intent to compete at the highest level.
content: The Haitians, thanks to some savvy scouts and persuasive agents, are putting together a team which hopes to shock Scotland in their opening World Cup game.

zh.title: 前凯尔特人英雄能否帮助海地爆冷苏格兰？
zh.summary: 海地在经验丰富的球探和有说服力的经纪人的帮助下组建了一支竞争力强的世界杯球队，希望在小组赛首战中爆冷苏格兰。该队雄心勃勃的准备展现了他们在最高水平竞争的决心。

title: You dream of these moments - Saints hero Charles
summary: Southampton midfielder Shea Charles scored a crucial winning goal in the Championship play-off semi-final against Middlesbrough, a moment he described as a dream-like achievement. The goal keeps Southampton's promotion hopes alive in the playoff race.
content: Southampton midfielder Shea Charles says his winning goal against Middlesbrough in the Championship play-off semi-finals is a moment he will never forget.

zh.title: 梦想成真——圣徒英雄查尔斯
zh.summary: 南安普顿中场球员谢亚·查尔斯在英冠附加赛半决赛对阵米德尔斯堡的比赛中打进关键致胜球，他将这一时刻描述为梦幻般的成就。这个进球让南安普顿在附加赛中保持晋级希望。

title: Why Man United should think twice about hiring Car...
summary: Analysis suggests that while Michael Carrick is widely considered the ideal candidate, Manchester United should carefully reconsider whether he is the right permanent managerial choice. The piece offers a counterpoint to prevailing opinion about Carrick's suitability for the role.
content: Everyone thinks Michael Carrick should be Man United's next permanent manager -- but should he?

zh.title: 曼联为什么应该三思而后行考虑聘请卡里克
zh.summary: 分析表明，虽然迈克尔·卡里克被广泛认为是理想人选，但曼联应该仔细重新考虑他是否是合适的永久主教练人选。这篇文章对卡里克适合该角色的普遍看法提出了反驳。

title: Man United's FA Youth Cup dominance isn't about tr...
summary: Manchester United's success in the FA Youth Cup reflects their strength in developing young talent, providing insight into the quality of the next generation at the club. The achievement highlights prospects like JJ Gabriel as part of their youth development program.
content: The FA Youth Cup might not seem significant at first look, but it is a useful window into the next generation at Man United and Man City. For United in particular, they have big hopes for JJ Gabriel.

zh.title: 曼联足总青年杯的统治地位与奖杯无关
zh.summary: 曼联在足总青年杯上的成功反映了他们在培养年轻人才方面的实力，为了解俱乐部下一代的质量提供了深入洞察。这一成就突出了像JJ加布里埃尔这样的前景是他们青年发展计划的一部分。

title: World Cup transport prices cut after fan backlash
summary: Bus and train prices for World Cup matches at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey have been reduced following fan complaints about the initial pricing. The price cuts followed swift action by organizers in response to public pressure for more affordable transport options.
content: Prices for buses and trains to World Cup matches at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey have been cut following a backlash from fans.

zh.title: 世界杯交通价格在球迷反对后下降
zh.summary: 新泽西州梅蒂夫体育场举行的世界杯比赛的公交和火车价格在球迷抱怨初始价格后已下降。价格下降是在组织者迅速采取行动回应公众对更实惠交通选择的要求后进行的。

title: Carrick presence inspiring for Man Utd kids, says Fletcher
summary: Michael Carrick's presence at Manchester United's FA Youth Cup campaign will serve as inspiration for the club's young players, according to Darren Fletcher. The involvement of the respected former player is expected to motivate the youth squad.
content: Michael Carrick will be watching on as Manchester United try to win the FA Youth Cup - and that will only inspire them, says Darren Fletcher.

zh.title: 弗莱彻表示卡里克的出现对曼联年轻球员具有鼓舞作用
zh.summary: 根据达伦·弗莱彻的说法，迈克尔·卡里克在曼联英足总青年杯活动中的出现将为俱乐部年轻球员提供灵感。这位受人尊敬的前球员的参与有望激励青年球队。

title: Beyond the Hollywood story - what are Wrexham really building?
summary: Wrexham co-owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob McElhenney are building a broader organization beyond just a successful men's football team. The BBC examines the business strategy and vision driving their investments in the Welsh club.
content: BBC Sport looks at how and why Wrexham co-owners Ryan Reynolds and Rob Mac are building more than just a successful men's team.

zh.title: 超越好莱坞故事——雷克瑟姆到底在建设什么？
zh.summary: 雷克瑟姆共同所有者瑞恩·雷诺兹和罗伯·麦克埃尔海尼正在建设一个超越仅有成功男子足球队的更广泛的组织。BBC审视了推动他们对这支威尔士俱乐部投资的商业战略和愿景。

title: Will Boro-Saints play-off have deciding third act?
summary: Southampton claimed a 2-1 victory over Middlesbrough in a Championship play-off match, but allegations of spying have thrown the outcome into question. The conduct allegations suggest the result may not stand as final.
content: Despite a 2-1 win for Southampton, allegations of spying means the outcome of their play-off with Middlesbrough is still not decided.

zh.title: 博罗-圣徒季后赛会有决定性的第三幕吗？
zh.summary: 南安普顿在英冠季后赛中声称以2-1击败米德尔斯堡，但间谍指控使结果受到质疑。品行不端指控表明结果可能不会成为最终结果。

title: All you need to know about Premiership title race
summary: Hearts and Celtic head into the final two games of the Scottish Premiership separated by just one point. The guide breaks down the title race as both teams battle for the championship in an epic season finale.
content: Hearts and Celtic head into the final two games in the Scottish Premiership separated by just a single point after an epic season. Here is your guide.

zh.title: 英超冠军争夺战完全指南
zh.summary: Hearts和Celtic进入苏超联赛的最后两场比赛，两队之间仅相差一分。本指南详细分析了冠军争夺战，两支球队为争夺冠军而进行激烈竞争，是本赛季最精彩的收官战。

title: Quiz: Name every club Mourinho has managed
summary: This quiz challenges readers to name all 10 clubs that José Mourinho has managed throughout his 25-year managerial career. "The Special One" has worked across numerous top clubs globally.
content: "The Special One" has managed 10 clubs across a 25-year career. Can you name them all?

zh.title: 小测验：列举穆里尼奥执教过的所有俱乐部
zh.summary: 这个小测验要求读者说出何塞·穆里尼奥在其25年的执教生涯中执教过的全部10家俱乐部。"特殊的一个"曾在全球众多顶级俱乐部工作过。

title: Liverpool owners face dilemma - stick or twist with Slot?
summary: Liverpool's owners FSG face growing pressure from fans regarding manager Arne Slot, with questions about whether to continue with his tenure or seek a change. The club's leadership must balance sporting ambitions with supporter sentiment.
content: Liverpool owners FSG face a dilemma as they consider whether to react to growing fan dissent against Arne Slot, says chief football writer Phil McNulty.

zh.title: 利物浦老板面临困境——坚持还是改变斯洛特？
zh.summary: 利物浦老板FSG面临来自球迷的越来越大的压力，关于主教练阿恩·斯洛特是继续任职还是寻求改变的问题。俱乐部领导层必须平衡体育野心与支持者的感受。

title: Coming soon: Alex Batty vanished at 11 - now he tells his story
summary: Alex Batty disappeared at age 11 on what he thought would be a holiday, vanishing for six years before his return. He now shares his remarkable story of abduction and survival.
content: At 11 years old, Alex thought he was going on holiday. Instead, he vanished for six years.

zh.title: 即将推出：11岁时失踪的亚历克斯·巴蒂 - 现在他讲述自己的故事
zh.summary: 亚历克斯·巴蒂在11岁时失踪，当时他认为自己是去度假，消失了六年后才返回。他现在分享了自己关于被绑架和生存的非凡故事。

title: Immortality beckons - but Hearts must overcome Celtic & weight of history
summary: Heart of Midlothian stand on the brink of winning the Scottish championship for the first time in 66 years, with the opportunity to clinch on Wednesday against Celtic. The historic moment awaits, but the club must overcome their rivals and the weight of decades of near-misses.
content: For Heart of Midlothian, the tantalising, scarcely-believable, bottom line is this: after 66 years they may be crowned champions of Scotland on Wednesday.

zh.title: 永生在招手——心脏队必须战胜凯尔特人队和历史的沉重负担
zh.summary: 米德洛锡安心脏队即将赢得66年来首次苏格兰锦标赛，有机会在周三对阵凯尔特人队时确保胜利。这一历史时刻已近在咫尺，但该俱乐部必须战胜对手，克服数十年无数次失败的沉重阴影。
